description_long: This is a small, round cake with a smooth, light brown body and a dome of white icing on top. The cake is topped with a single, dark chocolate teardrop-shaped piece, which sits on a small dollop of red jelly or fruit preserve. The sides of the cake are straight and vertical, giving it a neat, cylindrical appearance. The icing is evenly spread, with a slight peak in the center where the chocolate and red topping are placed. The cake appears to be displayed without any visible plate or tray, and its minimalist decoration draws attention to the central topping.
description: A small, round cake with smooth white icing, topped with a chocolate piece and red jelly, and a light brown body.
description_view_0: Front view shows the chocolate and red topping centered on the white icing dome, with the smooth brown cake body visible.
description_view_1: Similar to view 0, but the chocolate topping appears slightly more angled, and the red jelly is more visible on the left.
description_view_2: The chocolate topping is seen from a different angle, with the red jelly more prominent on the right side.
description_view_3: The chocolate and red topping are viewed from the back, with the white icing dome and brown cake body still clearly visible.
